version_description: Capo on 3rd fret. Very simple version of the chords that still sounds as close to the song. Stream Fine Line Dec. 13.

versions.version_description: This version is labelled as a No capo song but you can experiment, as well as with the key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
  Walk in your rainbow paradise (Paradise)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
  Strawberry lipstick state of mind (State of mind)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
  I get so lost inside your eyes[/tab]

Would you believe it?


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You don't have to say you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
You don't have to say nothing[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You don't have to say you're mine[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Honey, ahh[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, honey, ahh[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]F[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  Your wonder under summer sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
   Brown skin and lemon over ice[/tab]

Would you believe it?


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You don't have to say you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I just wanna tell you somethin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Lately you've been on my mind[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Honey, ahh[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, honey, ahh[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, honey, ahh[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do, ahh[/tab]

(It's the only thing I'll ever do, It's the only thing I'll ever do)
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you (It's the only thing I'll ever do)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, honey, ahh, oh, honey, ahh[/tab]

(It's the only thing I'll ever do, It's the only thing I'll ever do)
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you (It's the only thing I'll ever do)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you (It's the only thing I'll ever do)[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, honey[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
Ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
